info.title: School Man API
info.description: Generated OpenAPI specification for School Man backend

studentId.description: Identifier of the student the attendance belongs to

courseId.description: Identifier of the course the attendance refers to

slotId.description: Identifier of the timetable slot when the lesson occurred. Optional for legacy daily entries.

date.description: Date of the attendance entry in ISO 8601 format

reasonNote.description: Reason provided for the attendance change

excusedAt.description: Timestamp when the absence was excused

entityId.description: Primary key of the affected entity

payload.description: Optional JSON payload describing the change

performedBy.description: National ID of the user who performed the action

building.description: Building where the classroom is located

classGroupId.description: Identifier of the class group to override

curriculumItemId.description: Identifier of the curriculum item being overridden

weeklyHoursOverride.description: Override weekly hours for the class group

isDisabled.description: Disable this subject for the class group

subjectId.description: Identifier of the subject assigned to this curriculum item

weeklyHours.description: Weekly teaching hours for this subject

doubleSessionRequired.description: Whether this subject must be scheduled in a double session

notes.example: Lab requires a double block on Thursdays
notes.description: Optional notes for scheduling or curriculum review

isActive.description: Whether this curriculum is active for planning

items.description: Curriculum items for the grade level

recordedBy.description: User national ID who recorded the event

dateHappened.description: Date when the incident happened (ISO date)

studentId.description: Identifier of the student being enrolled

classGroupId.description: Identifier of the class group the student joins

schoolYearId.description: Identifier of the school year for the enrollment

studentId.description: Identifier of the student receiving the grade

courseId.description: Identifier of the course in which the grade is recorded

termId.description: Identifier of the term linked to the grade

mark.description: Numeric mark assigned to the student (5=S, 4=A, 3=B, 1=J)

comment.description: Optional comment that accompanies the grade
comment.example: Demonstrated excellent understanding of the material.

mark.description: Updated numeric mark for the student (5=S, 4=A, 3=B, 1=J)

message.example: Student John Doe has been absent.

name.description: Unique four-digit year identifier such as 2025

startDate.description: First day of the school year

endDate.description: Last day of the school year

active.description: Marks the school year as active for enrollment and scheduling

nationalId.description: Unique identifier used nationally for the student

guardianName.description: Full name of the legal guardian

description.example: Introduction to algebraic expressions and equations

schoolYearId.description: Identifier of the parent school year

name.description: Name of the term. Only predefined values are accepted

durationMinutes.description: Optional duration override; defaults to the difference between endTime and startTime
Optional duration override; defaults to the difference between endTime and startTime

subjectId.description: Subject identifier assigned to the teacher

teacherId.description: Teacher identifier (national ID) whose availability constraints should be considered

preferredShift.description: Preferred shift for this teacher. When set to morning/afternoon, only slots within that shift are considered.

avoidLastSlot.description: Prevents assigning the teacher to the latest slot of the day (useful for teachers who cannot work late).

courseId.description: Course identifier that should override the default behaviour

preferredShift.description: Preferred shift for this course. Acts as a hard constraint, so only slots in this shift will be considered.

blockLength.description: Number of consecutive slots required for each session of this course (e.g. 2 for double block). Defaults to 1.

sessionsPerWeek.description: Total sessions per week override. When omitted, the generator falls back to `courseInstance.weeklyHours`.

maxSessionsPerDay.description: Maximum number of sessions per day for this course. Overrides the default.

minGapSlots.description: Minimum gap (in slots) between sessions of this course on the same day.

allowDoubleBlock.description: Allows consecutive sessions of the same subject (double block).

targetDays.description: Explicit days of week (1=Monday ... 7=Sunday) to target for this course.

division.description: Division to generate (elementary, secondary, or senior)

teacherWeeklyHourCap.description: Maximum number of slots a teacher can cover during the week (applies to every teacher unless a constraint is provided externally).

teacherConstraints.description: Optional list of teacher constraints (e.g. availability per shift, avoid last slot).

balanceAcrossDays.description: Try to balance sessions across available days for each class group when possible.

avoidConsecutiveSameSubject.description: Avoid placing the same subject in consecutive slots for a class group.

maxSessionsPerDayDefault.description: Default maximum number of sessions per day for a course when no per-course override is provided.

minGapSlotsDefault.description: Default minimum gap (in slots) between sessions of the same course on the same day.

coursePreferences.description: Optional per-course overrides such as double blocks or session counts.

blockedSlots.description: Explicit blocked/break slots to avoid (e.g. lunch break). Times should match slot times.

nationalId.description: Unique national ID for the user

username.description: Optional username; defaults to nationalId when omitted

role.description: Only admins can create other admins

schoolYearId.description: School year identifier for the certificate
